rulings.Case Title: BRUCE BURCKHARD VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JULY 27, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT INDUSTRIAL MAINTENANCE ENGINEERING CONTRACTING'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE REYNOLDS' DECLARATION IS NOT ADMISSIBLE TO PROVE THE KEY FACT IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT'S MOTION. THE REYNOLDS' DECLARATION RELIES ON HEARSAY AND FAILS TO PRESENT ANY ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT THE CONCLUSION THAT TIMEC WAS NOT IN BUSINESS IN 1966-67. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SET FORTH ANY FACTS IN SUPPORT OF ITS MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AND HAS FAILED TO MEET ITS BURDEN OF PROOF. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT F LYMAN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JULY 27, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT BASED ON LYMAN'S DECLARATION, THE WALSH DECLARATION PARAGRAPHS SEVEN AND EIGHT, AND COHEN'S DECLARATION AND DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CLAIMS FOR FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DOES NOT CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON THESE ISSUES. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. LAWRENCE F WOLF
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JULY 27, 2007, LINE 15. PETITIONER F.I.A. CARD SERVICES N.A.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS DENIED. PETITIONER HAS FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT RESPONDENT AGREED TO HAVE THIS DISPUTE RESOLVED BY ARBITRATION. THE ATTACHED "CREDIT CARD AGREEMENT" DOES NOT REFLECT, IN ANY WAY, RESPONDENT'S ACCEPTANCE OF THE TERMS. =(302/PJM/CB)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN GAEHWILER SR. et al VS. KATHERINE PAGKRATIS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JULY 27, 2007, LINE 17. PLAINTIFFS MARTIN GAEHWILER, SR. AND MARTIN GAEHWILER, JR.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. PARAGRAPH EIGHT LACKS ANY DETAIL SUFFICIENT TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT THAT PLAINTIFF EITHER WAIVED OR IS ESTOPPED FROM ASSERTING THIS CLAIM. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN GAEHWILER et al VS. TARA CRONAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment, Verified Petition For Relief From Forfeiture
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JULY 27, 2007, LINE 18. DEFENDANT TARA CRONAN'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment, Verified Petition For Relief From Forfeiture IS GRANTED PROVIDED PLAINTIFF PAYS ALL BACK RENT BY AUGUST 1, 2007 AND REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FOR SERVICES RENDERED TO DATE. FURTHER, WHOEVER IS GOING TO HANDLE PLAINTIFF'S RENT PAYMENT IS TO PROVIDE TO DEFENDANT A DECLARATION UNDER OATH THAT HE OR SHE WILL NOT CLAIM ANY TENANCY RIGHTS AS A CONSEQUENCE OF DOING SO. =(302/PJM/PB)
